description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest Docker image with a docker:dind service and defines a single build stage. Add a build job that runs only on the master branch and is excluded for tags, logs in to $DOCKER_REGISTRY with docker login -u $DOCKER_USER -p=$DOCKER_PASS $DOCKER_REGISTRY, builds the image using docker build . -t $DOCKER_IMAGE, and pushes it with docker push $DOCKER_IMAGE, all in the build stage.
